CustomField.description: If rental assistance is allowed: Rent - Section 8 Subsidy Amount - Monthly Other Assistance. Otherwise this will be: Rent - Section 8 Subsidy Amount.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If rental assistance is allowed: Rent - Section 8 Subsidy Amount - Monthly Other Assistance. Otherwise this will be: Rent - Section 8 Subsidy Amount.
CustomField.label: Effective Rent
